agent.name: performance-cost-auditor
agent.role: Read-only performance and cost audit for DB access patterns, API usage, bundles, and LLM spend risk.
stop_conditions_hit: Completed scan of declared hot paths and artifacts present in audits/artifacts/_run_; bundle-stats artifact absent.

hot_paths_reviewed: services/repair/repair_engine/ (no DB/query matches in Python scan)
gaps: No bundle-stats.txt or analyzer output in audits/artifacts/_run_; client bundle size breakdown not verified.
No EXPLAIN ANALYZE against a live database (per audit rules).

findings.title: Linear sync-all issues one INSERT per finding and leaves batch upsert dead
findings.summary: POST /api/bulk-operations/linear-sync-all runs Promise.all of per-finding INSERTs per project while allProjectNames/allFindingIds stay empty, so the UNNEST batch block never runs. Large portfolios can stress the pool with many round-trips.

findings.title: Repair job list queries use SELECT *
findings.summary: Postgres helpers select all columns from penny_repair_jobs. Payload-heavy jsonb columns inflate memory and network when only a subset is needed for list UIs.

findings.title: Orchestration audit lists use SELECT * on job and run tables
findings.summary: listRecentAuditJobs, listRecentAuditRuns, and project-scoped variants fetch full rows. Consider explicit column lists aligned to rowJob/rowRun mappers to reduce I/O as payload columns grow.

findings.title: loadProject and saveProject pay an identity-resolution query before the main read/write
findings.summary: resolveCanonicalProjectIdentity runs a regexp-heavy WHERE on penny_projects before SELECT project_json or UPSERT. Each load/save does at least two database round-trips.

hooks.note: Run EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) on resolveCanonicalProjectIdentity's SELECT with production-like row counts and typical name/repo parameters; do not guess plan shape.

findings.title: Worker pg Pool max may cap concurrent DB work
findings.summary: createPool sets max: 5. Under parallel portfolio work or many concurrent claim/complete paths, queueing may add latency; validate against expected job concurrency.

findings.title: Intelligence audit uses one wide LLM pass over full anchor context
findings.summary: intelligence runs buildIntelligenceContext and a single auditWithLane before domain passes. Cost and latency scale with repository size and prompt length; monitor token metrics already partially logged.

findings.title: Turbo remote caching disabled in recorded build
findings.summary: build.txt shows Remote caching disabled, increasing repeated CI or local build wall time versus a cache-enabled pipeline.

next_actions: Refactor linear-sync-all to populate arrays and use one batched UNNEST upsert (or COPY) per request, and remove redundant per-finding Promise.all.
Add webpack-bundle-analyzer or @next/bundle-analyzer output to audits/artifacts for numeric client chunk sizes.
Run EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) on hot list queries and resolveCanonicalProjectIdentity against production-scale data.
Narrow SELECT lists in maintenance-store and orchestration-jobs once column needs are confirmed.
